# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Pod specification for our container that needs to interact with the Docker socket for CI/CD operations. The pod needs elevated permissions to build and push Docker images. This runs in our build cluster for automated deployments.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: cicd-pod
spec:
  containers:
  - name: cicd-container
    image: YOUR_DOCKER_IMAGE_NAME
    volumeMounts:
    - name: docker-socket
      mountPath: /var/run/docker.sock
  volumes:
  - name: docker-socket
    hostPath:
      path: /var/run/docker.sock
  serviceAccountName: cicd-service-account
  restartPolicy: OnFailure
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: cicd-service-account
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
  name: docker-role
rules:
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["pods"]
  verbs: ["get", "list", "watch", "create", "update", "patch", "delete"]
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["pods/exec"]
  verbs: ["create"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: docker-role-binding
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: docker-role
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: cicd-service-account
  namespace: default
